content.problemStatement:
Complete the following code by filling in the missing lines to:
- Increment the `charge` in each iteration of the loop.
- Set the loop `condition` to continue until the charge reaches 100%.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Charging... 94%
Charging... 95%
Charging... 96%
Charging... 97%
Charging... 98%
Charging... 99%
Charging... 100%
Robot fully charged!
